limitations: ai_investment_intensity: The 14% increase in information systems and communications expenses is not explicitly disaggregated for AI; no dollar amounts or AI-specific capex figures are disclosed in the excerpts. ai_narrative_concreteness: Named use cases (model risk, process automation, State Street Alpha) are described but no deployment metrics or quantified business outcomes are provided; score reflects named initiatives without production-level detail.
